transcript.text:
It used to be 400 Won (~$0.35 USD) per bowl 40 years ago
[The taste that's been passed down for 40 years]
[Jjolmyeon (Spicy Chewy Noodles)]
[Hamburg Steak]
They're big
Bon appetit
They tend to taste the same
But this one is different
[Everything is handmade here]
Much respect
Hello everyone
I'm here at Ansung today
I was told there's a famous Jjolmyeon restaurant here with 40 years of tradition
It's been hot these days, so I'm here to eat the cold spicy noodles
Its name is "Middle Snack" (Joong Ang Snack)
Let's head in

Hello
[Middle Snack (Joong Ang Snack) located in Angsung]
Excuse me,
What would you like?
1 order of kimbap (seaweed roll), 2 orders of jjolmyeon,
1 order of omurice, and 2 orders of hamburg steak
Isn't that a lot of food?
Are they big portions?
We're in the countryside, so yes
Even better
No cucumbers, please
[Kimbap]
[Jjolmyeon]
[Hamburg Steak (Salisbury Steak)]
[Omurice]
Thank you

Jjolmyeon
They're big
Thank you
Enjoy your meal
I don't even know if you can finish it all
I'll be fine
Take your time
Looks good Bon appetit
Jjolmyeon is what we're here for
Looks delicious
Do you make the sauce yourself?
[100% handmade]
Bon appetit
I love the noodles
Very chewy
It's spicy

Very spicy
Jjolmyeon tend to taste somewhat the same in general
But this one is different
There's a strong gochujang (chili paste) taste
And it's spicy
Sweet and spicy, but with more spiciness
We make the sauce here
So it's different from other places
Yes Spicy and different
It's gotta be spicy!
It's a good kind of spicy
A very deep anchovy broth
Hamburg steak this time
1 plain bite
Our broth is famous too
Broth? Yes, it's tasty

Is this famous?
Some people come just for the broth
This broth?
It really gets addicting as you eat
I can taste vegetables inside
Onions, carrots
Chopped vegetables
How do I explain the taste?
Delicious
How do I say this?
An old-style hamburger patty
[Precisely]
An old-style handcrafted burger patty
The sauce is very nice
The meat is chewy And the sauce is tangy
Goes well with jjolmyeon

Go ahead and try the omurice as well
That looks good too
The inside is red
It's ketchup
[She hates ketchup] I can't eat ketchup, but I'll do my best
Why am I such a picky eater?
I can eat ketchup?
I don't like eating ketchup
I don't taste it that much
It does, but it seems fine
This should be good with this sauce
Now that I've tried everything here
Let's officially start
It's a handmade jjolmyeon
How do you not get fat from eating like that?
[Right...?]

Eating that much and not gaining weight? You're blessed
[Con: High food bills]
Not married?
Yes
You need to find a good husband
It's okay I'll pay for my own food
[Cut it up into 4 pieces]
[You can't go wrong with Hamburg Steak]
[1 more bite]
There's rice here I almost didn't even eat it
I should've given you an apron
It's okay
Thank you though
We opened in 1981
We've been here for 42 years
I was 24 years old

I'm 65 now
A bowl of jjolmyeon used to be 400 Won each
These were 400 Won each? (~$0.35 USD)
That's 12 times cheaper
[Where has the time gone]
Wrap the kimbap with jjolmyeon
I'm the only customer here right now
It's because they're on a break time from 3pm to 5pm
The owner was nice enough for me to eat during the closed hours (break hours)
She said that I've come a long way, so she made an exception
[Thank you!]
Kimbap and the broth go well together
Eating just the kimbap is a little bland
But the broth finishes it off well
Some hamburg steak
I need to cut them into smaller pieces to eat them with jjolmyeon

It should be delicious together
[Now that's why people eat it together]
[Even the ketchup omurice]
Put the fried egg on top of the hamburg steak
Last piece of kimbap
[She ate it all]
Much respect!
[Thank you]
I thought you wouldn't be able to finish it just from the size of your body
It's because your food was delicious
Thank you
I've tried some different dishes here at Ansung
This place holds more than 40 years of tradition
It was a very new experience of jjolmyeon for me
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
